item.title: Night Patrols and Farm Paroles
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Night Patrols and Farm Paroles

In D.C., the night owls do stroll,
With FBI agents on patrol.
In Ohio, they aim
For a farm life less tame,
Where politics take a back roll.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Administration to Put F.B.I. Agents on Night Patrol in Washington
  • This Ohio Farm Community Is a Mecca for the ‘MAHA Mom’

item.title: Economic Quakes and Political Shakes
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Economic Quakes and Political Shakes

The tariffs caused data to waver,
Leaving Lula and Trump in a quaver.
The Fed held its rates,
While the judge sealed his fate,
And farm subsidies sparked some disfavor.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • U.S. Economy Grew in Second Quarter as Tariffs Scrambled Data
  • Brazil’s President Lula Voices Frustration With Trump Amid Tariff Battle
  • What to Watch at the Federal Reserve’s July Meeting
  • Trump’s Tax Bill Expands Farm Subsidies. Not All Farmers Will Benefit.
  • Tsunami Reaches U.S., and Trump’s Former Lawyer Confirmed as Judge

item.title: The Silent Fields of the Valley
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

The Silent Fields of the Valley

In the Valley, the farms are now bare,
As workers hide out in despair.
Trump’s policies reign,
Causing much strain,
While the fields yield naught but hot air.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • On a Quiet Southern Border, Empty Farms and Frightened Workers
  • Justice Dept. Says the Trump Administration Plans to Re-Deport Abrego Garcia
  • Republicans Prepare to Open ‘Pandora’s Box’ of Budget Gimmicks

item.title: Tariffs, Trust, and Tumult
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariffs, Trust, and Tumult

As tariffs were set to take flight,
Farmers quivered in tariff’s blight.
With aid talks in gear,
Trust flew out of here,
Leaving allies and laborers in plight.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • As Trump Tariffs Loom, White House Eyes Costly Farmer Bailouts
  • How Trump Supercharged Distrust, Driving U.S. Allies Away
  • As Trump Squeezes the Immigrant Work Force, Employers Seek Relief

item.title: Tariff Troubles and Market Woes
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariff Troubles and Market Woes

In Trump’s tariff game that’s absurd,
Farmers’ voices were left unheard.
Stocks took a hit,
Foreign markets lit,
While buying a car’s now deferred.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • How Trump’s Tariffs Affect U.S. Farmers
  • President Trump Is Making Foreign Stocks Great Again
  • Buying a Car? Trump’s Tariffs Could Make It More Expensive.
